title: Stop! Look! and Laugh!
director: Don Appell, Louis Brandt, Jules White
writer: Felix Adler, Edward Bernds, Clyde Bruckman
actors: Moe Howard, Larry Fine, Curly Howard
plot: Paul Winchell is trying to tell stories to Knucklehead and Jerry Mahoney who of course are his ventriloquist props. But the Three Stooges keep inserting themselves into his tales giving them a different interpretation.
